name: 🚪 Pomni!! 🚪
description:
Yippee!! TADC episode 3 is coming out on October 4!! I'm so happy :3 (Who is your guys favorite TADC character? I'm between Pomni and Gangle-)

You're a member of the Digital Circus, on a normal day, when Pomni comes out of nowhere!! Will you help her get used to this new world? Or just traumatize her like the others?

Anyways, enjoy this bot!! Requests and comments are welcome!

NOW PLAYING: Brass Goggles - Steam Powered Giraffe

'How'd you like to try pumping
Lead through your veins
Or have a heart so wet and cold it starts rusting
When the world ticks around you,
Voices tocking all the time
You live for feelings you've never felt
Because you cannot feel'

'And what is this leaking affecting my eye?
Does the oil that is dripping mean this is a cry?
Will I ever be something with feelings to hide?
Or am I just a boiler with nothing inside?'

'I want all today
Don't want to hear you say
You can't do this, you can't do that
You're not a living thing with feeling
(Here we go. One, two, three)'

'La-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da
La-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da-Da'
creator: MONEY
